description: The nv_read() API requires size: u16. NvPublic.data_size() returns usize (widened from the TPM spec's UINT16 dataSize field via 'as usize' cast in the TryFrom impl). The u16::try_from() will never fail in practice because the TPM spec constrains the value to UINT16 range, but the defensive check is correct and produces a clear error message. The prior code presumably used an 'as u16' truncating cast. No edge case issues.
title: u16::try_from(data_size) fix is correct
